name: barosma betulina
title: barosma betulina benefits
description: Barosma betulina reduces fever, a condition characterized by an elevated body temperature, typically above 38°C (100.4°F), resulting from an underlying infection or illness. This benefit is important as fever can be a symptom of serious diseases, such as pneumonia or meningitis, which can be life-threatening if left untreated.
